title: [PatPat] MwahMwah
body:
#

MwahMwah

A [PatPat](https://modrinth.com/mod/patpat) recource pack that replaces patting hand with floating heart and a kissing sound for players and cats. ![An image of a player being "kissed".](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/W3Y5hL3V/images/e5c11b8335892a48dbfd59db48f99fc5bcd1450c.gif) [![Link to Telegram channel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8717e5576a3ab697b6b1175828674f8191f6e738.png)](https://t.me/shitpost_r)
